name: pr_alc_tms_sdlc
drl:
rule "R0"
salience 10
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T1($a : k)
    T0($b : f1)
then
end
rule "R4"
when
    T1($a : k)
    $p : T0($b : f1)
    not Q()
then
    insertLogical(new Q($a));
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    delete($p);
end
rule "WQ"
salience -5
when
    $q : Q($t : tag)
then
end
rule "WN"
salience -10
when
    not Q()
then
end
_finding: TMS x late-continue recon: self-defeat COMPOSED with the trigger shape. R4's RHS insertLogical(Q) breaks its own `not Q()` (bit1 self-defeat) AND setFocus(gb)+delete($p) empties gb's R0 at the halt-check (staged-insert/delete coalescence) — so a bit1 deferred entry is pending exactly at the late-continue force. Pins whether that lane needs the !higher drain block there.
